name: Blessing of the Wind Charmer
desc: Send 1 WIND monster from your Deck to the GY; until the end of the next turn, each time a WIND monster(s) you control leaves the field, your opponent must return 1 card they control to the hand. You can only activate 1 "Blessing of the Wind Charmer" per turn.
strings: Send 1 WIND monster to GY to apply bounce effect
